headline: Susquehanna Maintains Neutral on Enphase Energy, Lowers Price Target to $32
summary: Susquehanna  analyst Biju Perincheril   maintains Enphase Energy (NASDAQ:ENPH) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $36 to $32.
